title: erigeron pumilus subsp. intermedius
intro: Erigeron pumilus subsp. intermedius, commonly known as dwarf fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Erigeron pumilus subsp. intermedius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Erigeron pumilus subsp. intermedius is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues such as wounds and acne.
